description_long: This is a plush, light blue octopus toy with a rounded head and eight short, rounded arms. The underside of the arms is a pale green color, providing a subtle contrast to the blue upper surface. The face features two large, black, embroidered eyes and a small, smiling mouth, giving it a friendly and approachable appearance. The surface appears soft and velvety, typical of stuffed toys designed for children. The toy is compact and appears lightweight, likely filled with synthetic stuffing. There are no visible accessories, clothing, or branding on the exterior.
description: A soft, light blue plush octopus toy with green undersides on its arms and a smiling face. It has a rounded head, eight stubby arms, and a velvety texture.
description_view_0: The octopus is seen from the back, showing the rounded head and the spread of its eight arms, with one eye partially visible.
description_view_1: A direct rear view of the octopus, displaying the full curve of the head and the symmetrical arrangement of the arms, with no facial features visible.
description_view_2: The octopus is viewed from the opposite side, showing the back of the head and the arms, with no facial features visible.
description_view_3: The front of the octopus is visible, showing both large, black eyes and a small, smiling mouth, with the arms spread out in front.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is cheerful and friendly, with large, round black eyes and a small, curved smile. There are no eyebrows or other expressive features.
attribute_pose_or_posture: The toy is in a sitting posture with its eight arms spread out evenly around its body and the head upright.
